notes: snapshot.rs:162 — 'Remote handoff snapshot RPC failed' is an anyhow .context() string attached to an Err on a remote RPC failure; it surfaces in error logs/diagnostics, not UI -> telemetry_payload, target null. ui_helpers.rs:551 — 'Run orchestrated agents' is the label arg of render_permission_row (a settings/permission row UI), sibling to 'Ask questions'/'Call MCP servers' -> UI, translated; 'Agent' kept English per glossary, pluralized as Agent. notebook_command.rs:740 — 'Open full screen' is the label of a block_footer_action_button (Maximize icon) that opens a lightbox -> UI button, translated '全屏打开'. secrets.rs:46/48/50/52 — four /// doc-comment fragments captured inside the lazy_static!{ } macro body for SECRETS_REGEX; not user-facing, extractor scan_macro_tokens false positive -> extractor_false_positive_doc_comment, target null.
